gt_sql: SELECT T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.major_name = 'Law and Constitutional Studies'
pred_sql:
SELECT member.last_name
FROM member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE major.major_name = 'Law and Constitutional Studies';
question: List the last name of all the students who majored Law and Constitutional Studies.
